title: Eric Weinstein Demands UFO Secrets From Pentagon Scientist
summary: Eric Weinstein and Eric Davis discuss UFO crash retrieval programs, the alleged lack of physicists involved in reverse engineering efforts, and the evidence supporting the existence of non-human technology in government possession. Davis shares details from his official investigations through AAWSAP and meetings with crash retrieval program personnel, while Weinstein challenges the scientific credibility and compartmentalization of these programs.

acronyms.definition: Research organization founded by Robert Bigelow in 1995 to study anomalous phenomena
Air Force research organization where Eric Davis worked

acronyms.expansion: Advanced Aerospace Weapon Systems Application Program
acronyms.definition: Pentagon program to study UAP phenomena
Government task force led by Jay Stratton to investigate UAP
Intelligence agency; David Grusch was liaison officer to UAP Task Force
Military intelligence agency involved in UAP programs
Agency responsible for nuclear security with site in Nevada
Highly classified program type that bypasses normal oversight
Advanced microscopy tool used to analyze materials
Agency that allegedly possessed film of Holloman AFB landing

acronyms.expansion: Air Force Office of Special Investigations

events.description: Roswell/Corona crash occurred at Foster Ranch in Corona, New Mexico
Holloman AFB landing - three UAP craft arrived, one landed, and a humanoid NHI being emerged and met with personnel
Jimmy Carter received classified UFO/Project Aquarius briefing in the Oval Office in June
Robert Bigelow founded NIDS (National Institute for Discovery Science)
Eric Davis hired at NIDS along with Colm Kelleher and George Knapp
Admiral Thomas Wilson attempted to access crash retrieval program and was denied
Eric Davis met with retired Admiral Wilson in EG&G parking lot, documented in Wilson-Davis memo
Dick Cheney left office, allegedly the last person with central leadership over crash retrieval programs

key_claims.claim: The Roswell/Corona crash was real and involved a craft of non-human origin
There are less than 40 crash retrievals total, with more than 10 craft in US possession
None of David Grusch's 40 firsthand witnesses were theoretical physicists
The crash retrieval program has made no success in reverse engineering after eight decades
Scientists could understand materials and construction of craft but could not reproduce the manufacturing process
CIA DS&T was the portfolio owner of the crash retrieval program at one time with Glen Gaffney involved
Admiral Wilson was denied access to crash retrieval program despite his position because he lacked need-to-know
George H.W. Bush learned about the Holloman AFB landing during his first CIA director briefing
Jimmy Carter prayed after receiving his UFO briefing due to the gravity of the information
Harry Reid intended to turn AAWSAP into a Manhattan Project-scale effort worth $1-2 billion over a decade
Eric Davis personally met five people who worked on the crash retrieval program
Dick Cheney was the last person to have central leadership over crash retrieval activities
